emails.subject: Executed Masters
emails.body: Executed Masters Not to make you all nervous, but I just got my 4th master signed. I'm fast approaching 10! I figure that at this rate, in 6-1/2 years, I'll be up to 461. Marie Heard Senior Legal Specialist Enron Broadband Services Phone: (713) 853-3907 Fax: (713) 646-8537 Marie_Heard@Enron.net
